dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the corruption runs deeper than ledger entries. {target_npc} found evidence that {quest_threat} has been going on for over a decade.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The master didn't just skim fees. They sold proprietary techniques to a rival guild and blamed the leak on former apprentices: people whose careers were destroyed by the accusation. {quest_ally} tracked down one of those apprentices in {location}. They've been living in disgrace for years, blacklisted from every workshop in the region. {quest_item} contains the master's correspondence proving the sales.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get {quest_item} from {location}. Every ruined career, every cheated student: all of it is connected. The master knows someone is looking and has started moving assets. We need the proof before it vanishes.

playerResponses.text: Innocent people were destroyed by these lies. I'll get the correspondence.
The master will fight back. Are we prepared for that?
This is bigger than I signed up for.

dialogueChunks.intro: The false hero found out about the investigation. They're not hiding anymore: they're attacking. Two witnesses have been intimidated into silence.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} was threatened directly. Someone broke into their home and left a message: stop digging or suffer the consequences. The false hero has allies on the council and among the guards. {quest_ally} says we need physical evidence from {quest_origin} because testimony alone won't hold up against someone this powerful. {quest_item} at {location} might contain the proof.
dialogueChunks.outro: The hero's reputation is their weapon. Every challenge to it makes them more dangerous. But the real defenders who died at Thornfield deserve the truth. Find the evidence that can't be threatened into silence.

playerResponses.text: Dead soldiers deserve truth more than living cowards deserve comfort.
Threatening witnesses is exactly what a guilty person does.

dialogueChunks.intro: The administrator is accelerating. Three safe houses have been cleared out. Money is being moved faster than we can track.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} intercepted a courier headed to {location} carrying {quest_item}: a partial accounting of where the relief funds actually went. Mansions, luxury goods, private guards: all purchased while {quest_stakes} slept in ditches. {quest_ally} says the administrator is planning to flee the region within days.
dialogueChunks.outro: The courier was stopped, but {quest_item} is only part of the picture. The full records are in a lockbox at {location}. Get them before the administrator's people destroy what's left. Those families deserve to know exactly how thoroughly they were betrayed.

playerResponses.text: The administrator doesn't get to run from this. I'll secure the records.
Can we freeze their assets before they flee?
They're powerful enough to disappear. Is this even winnable?
